chunking.description: Chunking configuration: global file exclusions and per-chunker rules.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for files to exclude globally from all chunkers (e.g. '**/vendor/**', '**/*.min.js').

package.description: npm package that exports createEmbedder(config). E.g. '@vivantel/virage-embedder-openai'

config.description: Config passed to the package's createEmbedder() factory. Supports ${ENV_VAR} expansion.

package.description: npm package that exports createVectorStore(config). E.g. '@vivantel/virage-store-postgres'

config.description: Config passed to the package's createVectorStore() factory. Supports ${ENV_VAR} expansion.

agents.description: Coding agent plugin names selected during init (e.g. ["claude-code", "copilot"]).

search.description: Optional retrieval configuration: hybrid search and re-ranking.

hybrid.description: Enable BM25 + vector hybrid search with Reciprocal Rank Fusion. Default: false.

hybridAlpha.description: Blend weight for hybrid search: 0 = pure BM25, 1 = pure vector. Default: 0.6.

package.description: npm package that exports createReranker(config). E.g. '@vivantel/virage-reranker-cross-encoder'

config.description: Config passed to createReranker(). Supports ${ENV_VAR} expansion.

pluginVersions.description: Installed plugin package versions, recorded by virage init/update.

installScope.description: Plugin installation scope chosen during virage init (local = .virage/plugins, global = ~/.virage/plugins).

chunkConcurrency.description: Number of files to chunk concurrently. Defaults to the number of logical CPU cores.

minEmbeddingBatchSize.description: Minimum pending-chunk queue size before triggering an embedding run. Default: 10.

minUploadingBatchSize.description: Minimum embedded-chunk queue size before triggering an upload batch. Default: 20.

noBanner.description: Suppress the startup banner. Can also be set via VIRAGE_NO_BANNER=1 environment variable.

maxPendingFiles.description: Max files whose chunks may be queued ahead of embedding before chunk workers pause. Default: minEmbeddingBatchSize × 3.

chunkerItem.description: Package-based chunker entry (ADR-038). The package declares which file types it handles via its built-in patterns.

package.description: npm package name for the chunker plugin (e.g. '@vivantel/virage-chunker-ce-md').

version.description: Semver range or exact version (e.g. '^0.1.3'). Informational — used for generator ID traceability.

include.description: Glob patterns scoping this chunker to a subset of files (e.g. ['docs/**']). If omitted, the chunker's built-in patterns apply to all matching files.

ignore.description: Glob patterns for files this chunker should skip (e.g. ['CHANGELOG.md']). Applied before the chunker's built-in patterns.

options.description: Options forwarded to the package's createChunker() factory (chunker behavior: maxTokens, overlap, etc.).
